get.description: Retrieves all custom enumeration definitions for the workspace. Enumerations are used to define dropdown options for entity properties.

name.description: Enumeration name (must be unique within workspace)

value.description: Internal option value used in data storage

post.description: Creates a new enumeration definition with the specified options. The enumeration can then be used in entity schema properties.

value.description: Internal option value used in data storage

value.description: Internal option value used in data storage

get.description: Retrieves a specific enumeration definition by ID, including all its options.

value.description: Internal option value used in data storage

delete.description: Deletes an enumeration definition. This operation will fail if the enumeration is currently in use by any entity schemas.

get.description: Retrieves entities with optional filtering by schema, owner, lifecycle, and search query. Supports pagination and different view modes.

value.description: Filter value (type depends on field and operation)

schema.description: Joined assessment identifier — required when conditions reference assessment fields
Filter by the current user's collection identifier
ISO 8601 date/time — if set, return entities reconstructed as they existed/will exist at this point in time (read-only snapshot mode)
When asOf is set, whether to apply future_update snapshots planned under projects on top of the reconstructed state. Defaults to true.
Maximum number of entities to return
Number of entities to skip for pagination
View mode (summary or full entity data)

canEdit.description: Whether the user can edit this entity

canDelete.description: Whether the user can delete this entity

canAdmin.description: Whether the user can manage entity permissions

canCreateChild.description: Whether the user can create child entities

_links.description: External links associated with the entity

_updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the entity's most recent update

linked.description: Whether the entity is linked to a project

isDone.description: Whether the entity is marked as done in the project

items.description: Complete entity record with schema-specific fields

get.description: Retrieves all entities pinned by the current user for quick access.

Entity identifier

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when entity was pinned

delete.description: Removes an entity from the user's pinned list.

get.description: Lists the current user's personal entity collections in the workspace.

schema.description: Entity identifier used to report membership

entityCount.description: Number of entities in the collection

isMember.description: Whether the requested entity belongs to the collection

get.description: Retrieves all workspaces the authenticated user has access to. Results include workspace metadata and configuration.

post.description: Creates a new workspace with the specified configuration. Can optionally create from a template or replicate from an existing workspace.

slug.description: Custom URL slug (auto-generated if not provided)

include.description: Data types to include when replicating

put.description: Updates workspace metadata and configuration. Requires workspace admin permissions.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a workspace and all its data. This operation cannot be undone. Requires workspace admin permissions.

get.description: Retrieves available workspace templates that can be used to create new workspaces with pre-configured schemas and settings.

post.description: Exports workspace data including configuration, schemas, entities, projects, and content. Returns a downloadable file with the exported data.

include.description: Data types to include in the export

lifecycle_ids.description: Filter entities by lifecycle state IDs

post.description: Validates and analyzes an import file, identifying conflicts and providing a summary. This is the first step in the import process.

valid.description: Whether the import file is valid

import_id.description: Unique identifier for a valid import session

available_data_types.description: Data types available in the import file

conflicts.description: List of conflicts that need resolution

post.description: Executes the import with the specified conflict resolutions. This is the second step after parsing the import file.

import_id.description: Import session identifier from parse response

preserve_ids.description: Preserve original IDs from source workspace

update_references.description: Update references to match new IDs

get.description: Retrieves all lifecycle states configured for the workspace. Lifecycle states represent the stages entities can be in.

label.description: Display label for the lifecycle state

put.description: Replaces all lifecycle states for the workspace. This is a full replacement operation - any states not included will be removed.

id.description: Optional ID for updating existing state

label.description: Display label for the lifecycle state

sort_order.description: Display order (defaults to end of list)

label.description: Display label for the lifecycle state

get.description: Retrieves all teams configured for the workspace. Teams are used to organize users and assign permissions.

put.description: Replaces all teams for the workspace. This is a full replacement operation - any teams not included will be removed.

id.description: Optional ID for updating existing team

sort_order.description: Display order (defaults to end of list)

get.description: Retrieves all user-to-team assignments for the workspace, including their roles within each team.

put.description: Replaces all team assignments for the workspace. This is a full replacement operation - any assignments not included will be removed.

get.description: Retrieves all role definitions for the workspace, including both built-in and custom roles with their capabilities.

builtin.description: Whether this is a built-in system role

capabilities.description: List of capabilities granted by this role

post.description: Creates a new custom role definition with the specified capabilities. Built-in roles cannot be created.

builtin.description: Whether this is a built-in system role

capabilities.description: List of capabilities granted by this role

put.description: Updates an existing custom role definition. Built-in roles cannot be modified.

builtin.description: Whether this is a built-in system role

capabilities.description: List of capabilities granted by this role

delete.description: Deletes a custom role definition. Built-in roles cannot be deleted. This operation will fail if the role is currently assigned to any users.

builtin.description: Whether this is a built-in system role

capabilities.description: List of capabilities granted by this role

get.description: Retrieves all members of the workspace with their assigned roles and user information.

put.description: Updates the role assignment for a workspace member. Requires appropriate permissions.

delete.description: Removes a user from the workspace. This revokes all their permissions and access to workspace resources.

get.description: Retrieves all users that can be added to the workspace, including their authentication provider and status.

email.description: User email address (may be null for OIDC users)

is_active.description: Whether the user account is active

get.description: Lists API tokens for the workspace without exposing token secrets.

capabilities.description: Workspace capabilities granted to the token

post.description: Creates a workspace API token and returns its secret once.

capabilities.description: Workspace capabilities granted to the token

token.description: Raw API token. It is returned only once at creation time.

delete.description: Revokes a workspace API token.

capabilities.description: Workspace capabilities granted to the token

get.description: Retrieves all entity type classifications available for project entities. These types help categorize entities within projects.

label.description: Display label for the entity type

put.description: Replaces all project entity types for the workspace. This is a full replacement operation - any types not included will be removed.

id.description: Optional ID for updating existing type

label.description: Display label for the entity type

sort_order.description: Display order (defaults to end of list)

types.description: Complete list of project entity types

label.description: Display label for the entity type

Filter by schema ID (for entity operations)
Filter by operation type (create, update, delete)
Maximum number of entries to return
Number of entries to skip for pagination

user_id.description: User who performed the operation (null for system operations)

user_display_name.description: Display name of the user (null for system operations)

entity_id.description: Identifier of the affected entity

public_id.description: Public identifier of the entity (if applicable)

entity_slug.description: URL slug of the entity (if applicable)

total.description: Total number of audit log entries

count.description: Number of operations of this type

byEntityType.description: Breakdown of operations by entity type

count.description: Number of operations on this date

get.description: Retrieves all entities the current user is watching. Watched entities generate notifications when they are modified.

entity_id.description: Entity identifier

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when watch was created

post.description: Adds an entity to the current user's watch list. The user will receive notifications when the entity is modified.

entity_id.description: Entity identifier to watch
Entity identifier

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when watch was created

delete.description: Removes an entity from the current user's watch list. The user will no longer receive notifications for this entity.

get.description: Retrieves all notifications for the current user, including changes to watched entities and other relevant updates.

entity_id.description: Entity identifier

operation.description: Type of operation that triggered the notification

changed_by_display_name.description: Display name of user who made the change

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when notification was created

delete.description: Marks all notifications as read and clears the notification list for the current user.

get.description: Retrieves the count of unread notifications for the current user.

delete.description: Marks a specific notification as read and removes it from the notification list.

query.description: The search query that was executed

scope.description: Scope where the file is located

projectPublicId.description: Public project identifier (if scope is project)

entityPublicId.description: Public entity identifier (if scope is entity)

comment_count.description: Total number of comments on the file

matchedFields.description: Field IDs that matched the search query

matchedMetadata.description: Metadata fields that matched the search query

fieldMatches.description: Fields that matched the search query

get.description: Retrieves the authentication mode configuration (local or OIDC). Used by clients to determine which authentication flow to use.

post.description: Authenticates a user with username and password (local authentication only). Returns JWT tokens for subsequent API requests.

access_token.description: JWT access token for API authentication

refresh_token.description: JWT refresh token for obtaining new access tokens

expires_in.description: Access token expiration time in seconds

get.description: Retrieves the OIDC provider authorization URL for initiating the OAuth2 flow. Client should redirect user to this URL.

authorization_url.description: OIDC authorization URL to redirect user to

post.description: Obtains a new access token using a refresh token. Used when the current access token has expired.

refresh_token.description: Refresh token (can also be provided via cookie)

access_token.description: JWT access token for API authentication

refresh_token.description: JWT refresh token for obtaining new access tokens

expires_in.description: Access token expiration time in seconds

post.description: Invalidates the current user session and clears authentication cookies.

get.description: Retrieves the authenticated user's profile, including roles, permissions, team assignments, and workspace memberships.

email.description: User email address (may be null for OIDC users)

global_roles.description: Global system roles assigned to the user

global_permissions.description: Global permissions granted to the user

workspace_roles.description: Workspace role assignments (workspace ID to role ID)

builtin.description: Whether this is a built-in system role

capabilities.description: List of capabilities granted by this role

patch.description: Updates user profile information such as display name and color preference. Users can only update their own profile unless they have admin permissions.

is_active.description: Whether the user account is active

get.description: Retrieves a list of all users in the system. Requires admin permissions.

is_active.description: Whether the user account is active

get.description: Retrieves the global role assignments for a specific user. Requires admin permissions.

put.description: Replaces all global role assignments for a user. This is a full replacement operation. Requires global admin permissions.

roles.description: Complete list of global roles to assign

get.description: Lists API tokens created by the current user across workspaces.

capabilities.description: Workspace capabilities granted to the token

post.description: Creates a workspace-scoped API token for the current user.

workspace.description: Workspace slug where the token will be valid

capabilities.description: Workspace capabilities granted to the token

token.description: Raw API token. It is returned only once at creation time.

delete.description: Revokes an API token created by the current user.

capabilities.description: Workspace capabilities granted to the token

get.description: Retrieves all AI conversations for the current user in the workspace.

post.description: Creates a new AI conversation with an optional title.

patch.description: Updates the title of an existing AI conversation.

delete.description: Deletes an AI conversation and all its messages. This operation cannot be undone.

get.description: Retrieves all messages in an AI conversation, ordered chronologically.
Retrieves the AI configuration for the workspace, including provider settings and enabled status.

base_url.description: Custom API base URL (null for default)

temperature.description: Temperature parameter for generation (0-2, null for default)

has_api_key.description: Whether an API key is configured

put.description: Updates the AI configuration for the workspace, including provider, API key, model, and other settings.

api_key.description: API key for the provider (null to clear)

base_url.description: Custom API base URL (null for default)
Custom API base URL (null for default)

temperature.description: Temperature parameter for generation (0-2, null for default)

has_api_key.description: Whether an API key is configured

post.description: Uses AI to extract structured entity data from unstructured text. Returns a list of potential entities.
Sends a message to the AI and receives a streaming response. Supports conversation context and custom state.

get.description: Retrieves publicly accessible schema definitions for diagram collaboration. Used by Diagram Craft for entity integration.
Retrieves publicly accessible entity data for diagram collaboration. Used by Diagram Craft for entity references.

post.description: Uses AI to generate diagram content based on provided messages. Supports streaming responses for real-time generation.

get.description: Retrieves comprehensive analytics about the workspace, including entity distribution, lifecycle coverage, ownership gaps, and field completeness metrics.

totalEntities.description: Total number of entities in the workspace

percentWithOwner.description: Percentage of entities with an assigned owner

percentCompleteness80Plus.description: Percentage of entities with 80% or more fields filled

lifecycleId.description: Lifecycle state identifier (null for entities without lifecycle)

count.description: Number of entities in this lifecycle state

percent.description: Percentage of total entities in this lifecycle state

lifecycleBreakdown.description: Distribution of entities across lifecycle states

lifecycleId.description: Lifecycle state identifier (null for entities without lifecycle)

count.description: Number of entities in this lifecycle state

percent.description: Percentage of total entities in this lifecycle state

coverage.description: Schema coverage analysis by lifecycle state

missingOwnerCount.description: Number of entities without an owner

missingOwnerPercent.description: Percentage of entities without an owner

ownershipGaps.description: Analysis of entities missing owners by schema

below50Count.description: Number of entities with less than 50% fields filled

between50And79Count.description: Number of entities with 50-79% fields filled

above80Count.description: Number of entities with 80% or more fields filled

completeness.description: Analysis of entity field completeness by schema

count.description: Number of entities using this schema

date.description: UTC calendar date for this activity bucket (YYYY-MM-DD)

startDate.description: Inclusive ISO 8601 start timestamp for this bucket

endDate.description: Inclusive ISO 8601 end timestamp for this bucket

created.description: Number of entities created during this bucket

updated.description: Number of entities updated during this bucket

days30.description: Daily entity create/update activity for the last 30 days

date.description: UTC calendar date for this activity bucket (YYYY-MM-DD)

startDate.description: Inclusive ISO 8601 start timestamp for this bucket

endDate.description: Inclusive ISO 8601 end timestamp for this bucket

created.description: Number of entities created during this bucket

updated.description: Number of entities updated during this bucket

days90.description: Daily entity create/update activity for the last 90 days

activityTrends.description: Entity activity trends derived from audit history

thresholdDays.description: Age in days used to classify stale entities

cutoffAt.description: ISO 8601 cutoff; entities updated before this time are stale

totalCount.description: Number of stale entities in the workspace

percent.description: Percentage of workspace entities that are stale

totalCount.description: Total number of entities using this schema

staleCount.description: Number of entities updated before the stale cutoff

stalePercent.description: Percentage of this schema's entities that are stale

stale.description: Entities whose last update predates the selected cutoff

post.summary: Compute a metric roll-up over box descendants
post.description: Computes an aggregated metric value for each given box entity, over its containment descendants, permission- and filter-scoped consistently with the entity browser.

boxEntityIds.description: Entity identifiers to compute the metric for

sourceSchemaId.description: Schema identifier that descendant source entities must match

kind.description: A numeric field on the source schema
A rating field on the currently joined assessment
The entity lifecycle state, ranked by its sort order
A select field on the source schema
An enum field on the currently joined assessment

aggregation.description: Aggregation function applied across matching descendant entities

worstDirection.description: Direction used for "worst" aggregation - "low" means lower values are worse, "high" means higher values are worse. Required when aggregation is "worst".

value.description: Filter value (type depends on field and operation)

assessmentId.description: Joined assessment identifier — required for assessment-sourced metrics

boxEntityId.description: Entity identifier the result applies to

value.description: Aggregated value; null when there is no matching, populated data

lifecycleId.description: The descendant lifecycle id that produced the result, for lifecycle-sourced min/max/worst aggregations; null otherwise

dominantValue.description: The most common option value among populated descendants, for enum/assessmentEnum sources; ties break toward the option listed first in the enum. Null for non-enum sources or when there is no populated data.

value.description: Option value

count.description: Number of matching descendants with this option

distribution.description: Full option distribution among populated descendants, for enum/assessmentEnum sources; empty for non-enum sources

sourceCount.description: Number of descendants matching the source schema (and current filters)

populatedCount.description: Number of matching descendants that had a non-missing value

min.description: Lowest aggregated value across all requested boxes

max.description: Highest aggregated value across all requested boxes

categories.description: Full option list for the resolved enum, for enum/assessmentEnum sources - including options with zero matches, so the legend can show them as present-but-empty

legend.description: Legend metadata derived from the returned results

get.description: Lists known job servers for workspace administrators. Available servers with no status ping in the last two minutes are reported as unavailable.
Lists system-owned recurring job schedules for workspace administrators. Schedules cannot be created or changed through this API.
Lists retained scheduled-job history for workspace administrators. Planned execution is best-effort and actual start time may be later.

post.summary: Cancel a queued workspace job run
post.description: Cancels a queued scheduled-job run without changing its recurring schedule. Running jobs are not interrupted.

post.summary: Queue an external content mount sync
